name: Elite Finish Detailing
description: Mobile car detailing in Omaha, NE. Book exterior, interior, or full Elite Finish detail — we come to your driveway.

skills.name: Book a Detailing Appointment
skills.description: Schedule a mobile car detailing appointment in the Omaha metro area. Services: Exterior Detail, Interior Detail, or Elite Finish (both). Vehicles: Car, Truck, SUV, Van, Exotic/Classic. Pricing: Cars $40–$100, Trucks $50–$120, SUVs $60–$140, Vans $70–$150. Add-ons: Excessive pet hair (+$15), Excessive trash (+$15). Travel fees: Free (Shelby area), +$10 (10–20 mi), +$20 (20+ mi). Hours: Mon–Sat 8 AM–6 PM.
examples: Book an exterior detail for my truck on Saturday at 10 AM
I need a full Elite Finish for my SUV next Wednesday
Schedule an interior detail at 123 Oak St, Omaha

service.description: Service type. 'Both (Elite Finish)' is the full interior + exterior combo at best value.

date.description: Preferred appointment date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be today or later. Mon–Sat only.

address.description: Service address where the vehicle is parked (street, city, ZIP)

addons.description: Optional add-ons: 'Pet hair' (+$15 for excessive pet hair), 'Trash' (+$15 for excessive trash)

notes.description: Optional notes about the vehicle. For exotic/classic cars, include year/make/model.

skills.name: Get Detailing Pricing
skills.description: Returns the full pricing matrix for Elite Finish Detailing services.

vehicle.description: Optional: filter pricing to a specific vehicle type

service.description: Optional: filter pricing to a specific service

payment_note: Cash on completion or crypto via Coinbase Commerce link texted after service.
